body: This PR makes the `variable` property of `ScheduledDiagnosticIterations` concretely typed, which may help with inference / allocations.
title: Use more concrete eltypes in diagnostics

body:
**Purpose**: Update to minor releases for ClimaParameters, Thermodynamics, RRTMGP, and CloudMicrophysics 

This PR:
- widens the SurfaceFluxes compat from 0.9.1 to 0.9
- updates interface changes for RRTMGP and CloudMicrophysics.
- enables strict parameter logging - all overridden parameters need to be used to prevent silent failures.
title: Update dependencies
